[2021-02-11 17:41] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): According to Punf's analysis in that, you never buy attack (if supply isn't an issue) when it's Wall vs an attacker that is a little better than Geese but worse than Tarsier xd
[2021-02-11 17:41] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): or more specifically
[2021-02-11 17:41] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): whoever buys attack first loses
